jobs.title: Principal Software Engineer
jobs.description: Ad Hoc is a technology company that empowers organizations to deliver scalable, impactful digital services. Using modern, agile methods, our team creates products that meet people's needs and transform their experience of government. The Veterans Affairs business unit helps transform the VA into a modern digital services organization. Principal Software Engineer - Front End/Back End serves as a subject matter expert while serving as an individual contributor that provides mentorship. Exhibits influential skills to shape future work streams within the current customer base while maintaining a strategic vision to successfully pursue new business opportunities.
requirements: Bachelor's degree and 10+ years of engineering experience
Extensive experience with large systems, leading large teams
Understanding interactions between people, systems, and processes
Provides organizational oversight of software engineering best practices
Exhibits in-depth understanding of software development to support business unit
Advocates for innovation and collaborates with leadership
Demonstrates significant technical competence and ownership
Mentors, guides, and coaches other engineers
Defines and delivers minimal viable products independently
Effectively communicates on existing systems for client-facing communications
Maintains strong ties with major technical ecosystem
Supports hiring, onboarding and career development
May represent the company publicly (blog posts, conferences, panels)
May work cross-functionally to support data analytics
benefits: Company-subsidized health, dental, and vision insurance
Paid parental leave after one year of service
jobs.notes: Principal level role - very senior position. Requires 10+ years experience. Government contractor working with VA. Remote position. Salary $160-187k.

jobs.title: Staff Backend Engineer (Implementation and Platform Configuration)
jobs.description: Staff Backend Engineer for digital life insurance enrollment platform. Develop web services using Python, PostgreSQL, Golang, and Java-based Drools rules engine. Build platform capabilities that scale with business. Collaborate with Product Managers, Underwriters, and external partners.
requirements: 8+ years of professional software development experience (backend)
Professional experience with Golang and Python
Comfortable using Docker for local software development
Experience working with distributed systems or microservices
Experience with PostgreSQL or other relational databases
Experience designing APIs (Protocol Buffers, Swagger, OpenAPI, etc.)
Experience building, deploying, operating, and troubleshooting software
benefits: 100% paid-premium option for medical, dental, and vision insurance
Beautiful office in Dallas Deep Ellum for those who prefer hybrid
Employee-led diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives
jobs.notes: Strong match - Go expertise, Python, distributed systems, microservices, PostgreSQL, API design all align. 20+ years exceeds 8+ requirement. Insurance domain (ActiveCare) is a plus. AI agents experience is a bonus. Remote-friendly. Salary $190-225k. Fit Score 88/100.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Build backend services and systems for enterprise SaaS financial wellbeing platform. Design scalable systems, work with Node.js/Python, GCP cloud infrastructure, Pulumi/Terraform. Focus on distributed systems, multi-tenancy, AI-enabled features.
requirements: Strong backend engineering with ownership of projects and systems
Proven experience building and maintaining scalable backend systems in SaaS
Solid understanding of distributed systems concepts and cloud infrastructure
Hands-on experience with Node.js and/or Python
Experience with cloud infrastructure, GCP preferred (AWS acceptable)
Security and compliance considerations in production systems
Experience using automation and AI-driven tools to improve developer productivity
Ability to break down complex problems and execute within defined scope
nice_to_have: Experience contributing to larger architectural initiatives (multi-tenancy, platform scaling)
Experience in financial technology, regulated, or compliance-heavy enterprise SaaS
Experience with data systems including data warehouses, pipelines, SQL/NoSQL databases
benefits: Paid sabbatical after 5 years of service
jobs.notes: Strong fit - backend engineering, Node.js/Python, GCP/AWS, distributed systems all align. Financial services background (Equifax) is a plus. AI agents experience matches. Salary $145-190k.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer - AI Product
jobs.location: United States (Remote-first, preference for Boston, Seattle, LA)
jobs.description: Building the first AI-powered platform purpose-built for hardware product development. The platform listens across tools teams already use, maintains a structured picture of every program, and proactively coordinates across disciplines when things change.
requirements: 5+ years building production backend systems, with 3+ years in Python
Demonstrated proficiency using AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, Claude, etc.)
Strong experience with FastAPI or similar async Python web frameworks
Production experience with PostgreSQL, including schema design, migrations, and query optimization
Hands-on experience with task queues and background processing (Celery, Redis, or similar)
Understanding of API design, authentication patterns (OIDC/JWT), and service architecture
Experience with containerized deployments (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines
Ability to balance rapid iteration with maintainable, well-tested code
nice_to_have: Production experience integrating LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.) and building AI-powered features with agent orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, or similar)
Hands-on experience with GCP services (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Secret Manager) and Terraform
Experience with data ingestion pipelines and ETL workflows
Background in B2B SaaS platforms, project management tools, or workflow automation
Understanding of hardware development, engineering workflows
benefits: Equity participation in LTIP + potential spin-out equity
jobs.notes: Strong match - Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Celery/Redis all match. AI agents experience aligns. 20 years experience exceeds 5+ requirement. Must have US citizenship or green card (export controlled). Remote-first. AI-native hardware dev platform - novel domain. RE-APPLIED with corrected resume (initial submission missing ActiveCare and US Air Force).

jobs.title: Enterprise Architect - SDLC
jobs.description: Enterprise Architect focused on SDLC (Software Development Lifecycle). Design and govern solution architecture for systems and software delivery lifecycle processes. Define architectural patterns, practices, processes, tool recommendations, and data integrations.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
Proven experience in enterprise delivery process architecture with focus on SDLC
Familiarity with TOGAF and other industry frameworks
Strong understanding of key IT operational domains (Engineering, Ops, ITSM, PMO, QA, Dev, Security, Risk, Change, Architecture)
Experience with software/system development methodologies, processes, and tools
Excellent communication, influence, and collaboration skills
benefits: Medical, Dental and Vision Insurance - START DAY ONE!
Paid Parental Leave and Adoption Assistance
Paid Training, PTO, 11 Paid Federal Holidays
Hybrid work from home schedule with 3 days/week in office at Zions Technology Center, Midvale
jobs.notes: Strong fit - enterprise architecture, SDLC focus aligns with backend experience. TOGAF is nice-to-have. Hybrid Midvale (new tech campus). RE-APPLIED with corrected resume (initial submission missing ActiveCare, US Air Force, and other experience).
jobs.interaction_notes: Applied with tailored resume + cover letter
